test_scenarios: public slug remains anonymous
private slug without token returns `404`
private slug with invalid token returns identical `404`
unknown slug with valid token remains `404`
private slug with valid token returns only its page-qualified data
all authorized private success/error responses are `private, no-store` with `Vary: Authorization`
public anonymous responses retain existing cache behavior
private Host resolver remains `NOT_FOUND`
no query or forwarding header unlocks a private page
sibling page-scoped endpoints share the same access decision
authorized data is never written to a shared snapshot

execution_evidence.notes: TDD sequence: tests were edited first. RED command was `pnpm --filter @uptimer/worker exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts test/public-status-pages.test.ts`; observed exit 1, 1 failed/8 passed, with `TypeError: resolveAccessibleStatusPage is not a function` at public-status-pages.test.ts:47. This directly matched the absent planned authorization-aware resolver, not a syntax or import-path error. GREEN added the minimum shared resolver/cache implementation; rework expanded the sibling endpoint matrix.

2.result: Administrators reach private pages through the existing login flow
2.verification: `pnpm --filter @uptimer/web exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts && pnpm --filter @uptimer/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @uptimer/web lint && pnpm --filter @uptimer/worker exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts test/pages-homepage-worker.test.ts && git diff --check` exits zero; `wrangler pages dev` browser verification opens a private deep link while logged out, returns through `/admin/login`, renders page-qualified status/history/detail data after login, survives refresh, clears private data on logout, rejects an invalid stored token, and proves public/private pages warmed in both orders never cross-serve HTML or browser caches
test_scenarios: public status routes do not require login
anonymous private deep link redirects to login only after `NOT_FOUND`
safe pathname/search/hash return location is preserved
an absolute/external return target cannot be used
successful login returns to the private route
invalid token is cleared and does not loop
authorized Public API calls include Bearer and `no-store`
memory and persisted public caches are bypassed
logout resets auth-sensitive Query keys and removes private content
Pages never caches stale/branded HTML for a possibly private slug
private custom hostname returns no-store `404`
default, public slug, and public custom-host behavior remain unchanged

discovery_cache.reason: HTML injection, fallback, and cache policy
token verification and auth-sensitive Query reset
optional Public auth and cache bypass

execution_evidence.verification_result: pass: Worker 73/73 focused tests; Web 5/5 tests; worker+web typecheck exit 0; worker+web lint exit 0; git diff --check exit 0. HITL browser matrix via wrangler pages dev + Chrome: (1) anonymous private deep link redirects to /admin/login; (2) login returns to /status/private-demo with correct Private Status branding and monitor data; (3) refresh survives; (4) public page renders without login (Alpha Status); (5) invalid stored token cleared and redirected to login without loop; (6) logout (token removal) redirects to login; (7) public+private warmed in both orders never cross-serve (Alpha vs Private titles correct); (8) private custom hostname resolve-host returns 404; (9) safe return target unit tests reject external URLs. Root cause fix during HITL: computePublicStatusPayload was calling resolvePublicStatusPageById (is_public=1 only); added resolveAccessibleStatusPageById with isAdmin parameter and passed isAdmin from the status route.
execution_evidence.verification_command: pnpm --filter @uptimer/worker exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts test/public-status-pages.test.ts test/public-ui-analytics.test.ts test/public-status.test.ts test/public-page-keys.test.ts test/pages-homepage-worker.test.ts && pnpm --filter @uptimer/web exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts && pnpm --filter @uptimer/worker typecheck && pnpm --filter @uptimer/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @uptimer/worker lint && pnpm --filter @uptimer/web lint && git diff --check
execution_evidence.notes: HITL executed via pi-chrome against wrangler pages dev (dist) on :8788 with Worker on :8787 and local D1. D1 seeded with private-demo page (id=15, is_public=0, monitor 900001). Bug found and fixed during HITL: computePublicStatusPayload used old public-only ID resolver, causing 404 for admin private status. Fixed by adding resolveAccessibleStatusPageById and passing isAdmin through the status route.

last_review.evidence: UI accessibility follow-up pass: loading gate now announces status politely; AdminLogin error is alert/live and associated with token input via aria-invalid and aria-describedby; Web 5/5, typecheck/lint/diff-check clean.

details.evidence_ref: 22 files reviewed: migration, settings, schemas, public payloads, guards, admin UI, status page UI, pages worker, 9 test files

StatusPage.tsx L370-380 (site_title from page data), AdminDashboard.tsx (no site_title/site_description settings UI), types.ts L129-130,196-197 (API types preserved for compatibility), settings.ts (no site_title/site_description), migration 0016 (correct DELETE), homepage.ts L52-53 (HomepagePublicSettings still typed with site_title/site_description for backward compat)

All six audit lenses pass: Host trust boundary (X-Forwarded-Host/query ignored), cache key isolation (host-qualified), Zod validation, parameterized queries, fail-closed unknown hosts, ZodError handling. 60 tests pass; typecheck and lint clean. No findings.
